shadcn-html / sortable

Made from: CSS JS

Sortable

Drag-and-drop reorderable list using the native HTML Drag and Drop API.

Component Specification — components/sortable/sortable.md

Native basis

HTML Drag and Drop API for reorderable lists.

Web Platform APIs

Drag and Drop API draggable

Default

  • ⠁⠁Build components
  • ⠁⠁Write documentation
  • ⠁⠁Deploy to production
  • ⠁⠁Run tests
<ul class="sortable" role="listbox">
  <li class="sortable-item" draggable="true" role="option">
    <span class="sortable-handle">⠁⠁</span>
    <span>Item 1</span>
  </li>
</ul>
